MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAR-29-2016 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S STIPULATED MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE. JIM LARSEN APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE PURSUANT TO PARTIES' STIPULATION. THE TRIAL DATE OF 4/11/16 IS CONTINUED TO 10/24/16 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.
